item.title: 國學究竟應當如何入門？
item.description: 這似乎實在不是一個容易回答的問題。然而，若做足研究的話，其實是有跡可循的。

item.title: How I Made 100% Profit in Crypto in Fifth Grade — In Less Than Three Months — and Why I Left Forever
item.description: I'm not here to tell you "Bro you should've invested in crypto in 2010", because I wasn't even one year old back then. But...

item.title: Why I’ve Never Written a Single Piece of "AI Software" — and My View on It
item.description: Welcome to the post-ChatGPT era, where nobody cares about solving real problems anymore. Everyone is just trying to add AI to everything.

item.title: KISS: How I Built LinkDown and My Philosophy of Software
item.description: Back in the “good old days,” when I was still using Windows and was in middle school, I created this software...

item.title: "I am not what I am." — Homebrew Python PIP
item.description: Unfortunately, it's neither William Shakespeare nor Iago who said it this time. It's Homebrew Python.

item.title: Traditional Chinese Medicine Speedrun: Yin–Yang and The Five Agents
item.description: Yin–Yang and the Five Agents are the foundations of Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM).

item.title: For Safety, or Their Own Safety? My Frustrations with OpenAI
item.description: I’m now totally disappointed and annoyed with OpenAI.

item.title: Fixing Fn + F on macOS with Third-Party Keyboards Using Macros
item.description: About a month ago on my birthday, my friend @ZigaoWang gave me a Keychron K2 Max with Banana switches.
